title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: WeatherNext is Google DeepMind's global weather forecasting AI model that successfully predicted Hurricane Melissa's intensity and track in October 2025, providing advance notice that enabled the National Hurricane Center and local authorities to issue timely evacuation warnings before the Category 5 storm made landfall in Jamaica.
